programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla

programme.desc: The Harts receive a last-minute invitation to the wedding of Jonathans old girlfriend and discover she is being forced into the marriage

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: When a woman Mary Beth saved from suicide winds up murdered shortly thereafter the investigation uncovers massive gambling debts and sends Cagney and Lacey after a loan shark who may be involved

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: A criminal investigation becomes personal for Hutch when he learns the homicidal maniac among a band of thieving dockworkers is engaged to marry Hutchs childhood friend Nancy

programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kates mother and her fiancé visit the McCoys Kate feels theres something not right about the couple

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Determined to fit into a tight Anniversary Dress and concerned that she is taking after her corpulent Aunt Bessie Kate embarks upon a crash program of diet and exercise

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Predatory electronics salesman Jack Rhodes uses a video dating service to pick up lonely young women for one-night stands but meets his match in cunning enticing Barbara who invites Jack on a date to her high-rise apartment loft

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate the murder of a gym owner and realize that a mysterious pair of boxing gloves may be to blame

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A gunfighter confronts his past

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A conniving con-man posing as a salesman gets more than he bargained for when he comes knocks at the door of the wrong family

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: Smart 522
programme.desc: Smart 522

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is tricked into returning to Orly County where hes quickly arrested and imprisoned by the unscrupulous Sheriff Lobo BJ and his fellow falsely accused prisoners plot a jailbreak and a mad dash for the county line

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan nixes a mission to destroy a synthetic fuel plant because the caper is too riskybut he is overruled - and forced to participate in the scheme by the ploys mastermind a strong-willed determined female scientist

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Masquerading as German workers Hogan and the crew have made elaborate and foolproof plans to blow a German cannon factory sky-high - but their plan backfires when Newkirk winds up being drafted into the German army

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys try to make some money with some phony pearl oysters but their scheme backfires when a greedy Binghamton takes over their operation Then when Chief Urulu muscles in on Binghamtons business McHale and The Crew put a stop to the whole operation by taking advantage of an old native superstition and some Japanese technology

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Major complications develop when the guys send a chapter of Parkers war novel - Including a highly fictionalized account of his sinking of the biggest battleship in the Japanese fleet - To Parkers hometown girlfriend in an attempt to help him win her heart

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When Gomers cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomers uniforms and then wanders the base everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carters sister Carter is determined to break them up

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: verybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Gilligans Island

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: The ladies fix up Ponder with a woman who used to be a man

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: After Stonewall who is in trouble with the city for exploding cars seemingly dies in an explosion Stiles as executor of Stonewalls will must see that Wood does ridiculous tasks from a series of five envelopes for the inheritance

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: Tanna investigates the mysterious disappearances of beautiful Las Vegas showgirls and discovers they have been abducted by a white slaver When he gets caught trying to rescue them Binzer and Roth try to rescue him

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Maxs long-dead ex-wife suddenly reappears kidnapping and a hot diamond necklace are not far behind

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick becomes jealous when Joanna decides to keep a date with her old college boyfriend that they made twenty years ago

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam and Renee investigate a dead pregnant woman missing her fetus They discover a town that Daan helped after a nuclear meltdown and a suspicious brother and sister who were part of an early experiment to combine human and Taelon DNA

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team is sent to Grovers Mill when it is discovered the 1938 radio broadcast of invasion was real They meet with a group of local men who successfully fought the Martians 50 years ago and believe the Martians have returned to try and retrieve weapons abandoned in 1938

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressas estranged sister arrives unwittingly bringing danger with her As a class 5 hurricane rages will Alec be able to save his human friends

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dr Russells presumed-dead husband mysteriously reappears on a reconnaissance mission to a nearby planet

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Uncle Jesse reconvenes the Ridge Raiders when he learns that Boss has misappropriated funds for a senior citizens center to build a strip club But when other members of the Ridge Raiders resort to questionable tactics - such as bombing old moonshine stills - Jesse convinces them there are other ways to protest Boss actions

programme.title: Hercules 208
programme.desc: Hercules 208

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Strange assaults and several deaths may be related to a DoorsTaelon joint venture where Taelon core energy was used to heal people It appears that the energy is being sucked back out of the patients

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: James Woods plays the perfect homely US Navy sailor in dress blues with a bad temper along with his Navy buddies they are looking for a jeweler that closed his store a few days before they hit town Their course leads to murder anchors aweigh

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Some of the best finishes from 'Shock N Awe'.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Benny Carr v. Kieran Rice

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: State of State
programme.desc: Welcome to the official homepage of “STATE of STATE with Justin King and Tom Hannifan" presented by the Bleav Network. WE ARE your destination for year round Penn State football coverage!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A warp zone that only opens every 1000 video years is the gateway for King Charles who wants to go home But his final decision is send Gameboy at his place The supercomputer Gameboy turns out to be a lot of trouble for the N team But things get worse when Mother Brain gets Gameboy and and Dr Wily turns him into Game Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and the N Team are off to Hyrule to meet Kevins favorite game hero Link and Princess Zelda Mother Brain gives the Potion of Power to Gannon that restores an evil wizard to his rightful form

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger uses a time portal to change Earths history The team must stop him or they themselves may cease to exist

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids meet Lorn - an orphan boy with a magic talisman - and invite him to join the team But Lorns talisman is more dangerous than any of them realizes

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadgets assignment here is to protect a star musician Rick Rocker However Rick is startled by Gadgets appearance and is trying to avoid him But Dr Claw is planning to make some kind of mind-control record he wants to use Rick rocker So Gadget must protect Rick Rocker from Dr Claw and stop Claws production of the mind-control record

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget with the help of his niece Penny stops MAD agents from stealing gold from the ancient City of Gold and uncover a real gold temple

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kills toy reduces the human race to electrical impulses imprisoned within five crystal globes

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill faces a threat from within as Zero rallies disgruntled Renegades into a faction that opposes both the Guardians and the Renegades; with Turbo and Crasher as hostages the rebels set out to lure Leader-1 and Cy-Kill to their destruction

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While everyone is sleeping Herc lands on a planet in search of a buried treasure Monster Minds force them to flee and Herc sets a new course to find Audric to make up for lost time that takes them through a whole galaxy controlled by Saw Boss

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss blackmails King Phineas into luring Jayce with an image of his father to a planet where Saw Boss is ready to destroy him Saw Boss makes good his threat to pull the Vortex Plug which would allow the atmosphere of the upper level

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM learn to hypnotize people through their televisions in order to help in their plans to incinerate an oil base in Texas
